flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.4% at Jackson State University exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($24.8k debt amortized over 10 years vs $39.1k earnings).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Jackson State University rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $12.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Jackson State University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (77.4% → 62.4%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 7 pp at Jackson State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (32.2% vs 39.6%).
